name: Cheddar Potatoes with Wreath of Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen broccoli, cauliflower, and carrot mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Butter a 2-quart casserole dish lightly.
3. In a medium saucepan, bring water, butter, garlic powder, and pepper to a boil.
4. Remove from heat; stir in instant potato flakes, milk, cheddar cheese, mustard, and eggs until well blended.
5. Place the mixture into the buttered casserole dish.
6. Using the back of a spoon, make indentions around the edge of the casserole, 2 inches wide by 1 inch deep.
7. Bake uncovered at 325 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
8. Meanwhile, cook the vegetables according to package directions and drain.
9. Add butter and stir to coat.
10. Spoon the cooked vegetables into the indentions in the hot potato mixture.
